name: ZCL_TEST
source:
class ZCL_TEST definition
  public
  final
  create public .

public section.

  interfaces IF_HTTP_EXTENSION .
protected section.
private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS ZCL_TEST IMPLEMENTATION.


  METHOD if_http_extension~handle_request.
    TYPES:BEGIN OF ty_data,
            vbeln   TYPE string,
            posnr   TYPE string,
            kunnr   TYPE string,
            address TYPE string,
            sdfbh   TYPE string,
            lxrdh   TYPE string,
          END OF ty_data.

    DATA lt1 TYPE TABLE OF ty_data.
    DATA lt2 TYPE TABLE OF zsd11y .
    DATA ls2 TYPE zsd11y .
    DATA lv_verb TYPE string .
    DATA lv_json TYPE string . "传入转化为json
    DATA:ev_json TYPE  string."返回转化位JSON
    DATA:ev_json1 TYPE  string."返回转化位JSON
    TYPES:BEGIN OF mess,
            id   TYPE char20,
            sign TYPE char1,
          END OF mess.
    DATA lt_mess TYPE TABLE OF mess.
    DATA ls_mess TYPE  mess.
    CONDENSE  lv_json NO-GAPS.
    lv_json = server->request->get_cdata( ).

* Only handles GET method
*调用方法  POST/ GET
    lv_verb = server->request->get_header_field( name = '~request_method' ).
*返回结果 LV_REUTURN
*    CHECK lv_verb = 'GET'.
*    server->response->set_status( code = 200 reason = 'Ok' ).
*    server->response->set_content_type( 'application/json' ).
*    server->response->set_cdata( data = LV_REUTURN ).

*解析JSON成内表
    /ui2/cl_json=>deserialize( EXPORTING json   = lv_json
                                     assoc_arrays     = abap_true
                                     assoc_arrays_opt = abap_true
                                     pretty_name = /ui2/cl_json=>pretty_mode-camel_case
                                     CHANGING data    = lt1[] ).
    "处理数据 存表 或者bapi产生单据
    LOOP AT lt1 INTO DATA(ls1).
      MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls1 TO ls2.
      APPEND ls2 TO lt2.
      CLEAR ls2.
    ENDLOOP.
    MODIFY zsd11y FROM TABLE lt2.


    "数据处理结果
    ls_mess-sign = 'S'.


*将返回数据数据转成JSON
    ev_json1 = /ui2/cl_json=>serialize( data             = ls_mess
                                       assoc_arrays     = abap_true
                                       assoc_arrays_opt = abap_true
                                      ).
*返回结果 ev_json1

*    server->response->set_status( code = 200 reason = 'Ok' ).
*    server->response->set_content_type( 'application/json' ).
*      server->response->set_cdata( data = ev_json ).
    server->response->set_cdata( data = ev_json1 ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.
